meta.title: On Data, Complexity and Asking Questions That Matter
meta.description:
The theme for S4x23 was Explore! Andrea Jones-Rooy gave a great opening keynote that got rave reviews and set the tone for the event. 

Andrea is an explorer in her own right, and this is what had S4 seek her out for the keynote. She is 
- a Professor at the NYU Center for Data Science
- a standup comedian
- a circus artist

and she took advantage of all these skills to bring her message to the S4 audience.

(How many OT Security sessions end with an interpretative dance summary)
